runTitle: Vercel Playwright MCP QA - Guest Login AI Assistant Check
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production /api/health healthy with database/cache/AI connected
/login guest PIN flow reaches authenticated landing session
Authenticated /dashboard route renders through guest session
/dashboard snapshot renders total 18, online 17, warning 1, risk 0, offline 0
AI sidebar opens from production dashboard and reports AI engine Ready
AI assistant renders server-status summary response with Streaming AI and analysis basis
Direct AI prompt for warning server and action recommendation returns concrete cache-redis-dc1-01 memory warning guidance
skippedSurfaces: Broad landing/privacy/modal sweep skipped; scope limited to guest login and AI assistant health
OAuth provider end-to-end login skipped; guest PIN flow was the requested browser QA path
Reporter and Analyst advanced generation flows skipped
Cloud Run admin monitoring/traces skipped; Vercel /api/health and AI chat path covered

expertAssessments.rationale: Production AI assistant returned concrete status and warning-action guidance through the guest-authenticated browser flow.
Playwright MCP covered browser login, protected dashboard navigation, AI sidebar open, direct prompt send, and response evidence.
Vercel deployment inspection, health endpoint, AI stream 200, console cleanliness, and usage check were green for the tested target.
Dashboard status-count snapshot and AI response both used the current 18-server topology and identified the live warning server context.

usageChecks.summary: npm run check:usage:vercel passed after guest-login AI assistant MCP QA; current billing period effective=17.7346 USD, billed=0.0000 USD, chargeCount=15834.

completedImprovements.title: AI assistant works through Vercel Playwright MCP guest login on v8.11.36
completedImprovements.evidence: Production Playwright MCP verified guest PIN login, authenticated dashboard, AI sidebar Ready state, direct chat response, AI stream 200, and console cleanliness.

notes: Guest login browser flow was used as requested.
System start button click was blocked by automation safety heuristics, so the same authenticated session navigated directly to /dashboard.
Two navigation-related /api/system net::ERR_ABORTED requests were non-blocking and followed by /api/system 200.
mode audit: response surfaced Streaming AI and analysis basis with server metrics lookup in auto mode.
